onboarding.title: Set up your first alert
onboarding.subtitle: You'll receive emails when tenders matching your criteria appear
onboarding.skipHelp: You can create alerts anytime from the Alerts menu

step1.title: What sector do you work in?
step1.subtitle: This helps us suggest relevant CPV codes
step1.placeholder: e.g. Cleaning services, construction, IT consulting...

step2.title: Which regions do you operate in?
step2.subtitle: Select all that interest you. You can change this later.

step3.title: What amount range?
step3.subtitle: Leave empty if you want to receive tenders of any amount

step4.title: Keywords and name
step4.subtitle: Words that must appear in the tender title or description
step4.keywordsHelp: Separate with commas. e.g. maintenance, refurbishment

success.title: Alert created!
success.subtitle: You'll receive an email at {{email}} when matching tenders appear

page.title: Alerts
page.subtitle: Email notifications for tenders matching your criteria

empty.title: You don't have any alerts yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first alert to start receiving notifications about tenders that interest you

form.nameHelp: A descriptive name to identify it
form.criteriaSubtitle: You must fill in at least one. We combine all with AND (the tender must meet ALL).
form.keywordsHelp: Separate with commas. We search title and description.
form.cpvHelp: Common Procurement Vocabulary codes. Separate with commas.
form.importeSubtitle: Leave empty if you don't want to filter by amount
form.emailHelp: Leave empty to use your account email
form.isActiveHelp: Inactive alerts don't send emails but can be reactivated at any time

validation.atLeastOneCriterion: You must define at least one search criterion
validation.importeRange: Minimum cannot be greater than maximum

delete.title: Delete alert?
delete.message: You're about to delete the alert "{{name}}". You will stop receiving notifications about these criteria. This action cannot be undone.

preview.title: Email preview
preview.subject: Subject: {{count}} new tenders for "{{alertName}}"
preview.sampleBody: We found {{count}} new tenders matching your alert:
